mapper.select: SELECT v.graduate_id AS graduateId, v.student_id AS studentId, v.user_id AS userId, v.graduate_year AS graduateYear, v.destination, v.destination_name AS destinationName, v.destination_detail AS destinationDetail, v.certificate_no AS certificateNo, v.graduate_create_time AS graduateCreateTime, v.graduate_update_time AS graduateUpdateTime, v.student_no AS studentNo, v.enroll_date AS enrollDate, v.student_graduate_date AS studentGraduateDate, v.username, v.phone, v.user_status AS userStatus, v.status_name AS statusName, v.real_name AS realName, v.gender, v.gender_name AS genderName, v.avatar, v.id_card AS idCard, v.college_name AS collegeName, v.major_name AS majorName, v.class_name AS className, v.grade, tg.type AS teacherType, v.counselor_name AS counselorName, v.counselor_avatar AS counselorAvatar, v.counselor_title AS counselorTitle, v.supervisor_name AS supervisorName, v.supervisor_avatar AS supervisorAvatar, v.supervisor_title AS supervisorTitle FROM teacher_graduate tg INNER JOIN v_graduate_info v ON tg.graduate_id = v.graduate_id WHERE tg.teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY v.graduate_year DESC, v.graduate_id ASC

SELECT v.graduate_id AS graduateId, v.student_id AS studentId, v.user_id AS userId, v.graduate_year AS graduateYear, v.destination, v.destination_name AS destinationName, v.destination_detail AS destinationDetail, v.certificate_no AS certificateNo, v.graduate_create_time AS graduateCreateTime, v.graduate_update_time AS graduateUpdateTime, v.student_no AS studentNo, v.enroll_date AS enrollDate, v.student_graduate_date AS studentGraduateDate, v.username, v.phone, v.user_status AS userStatus, v.status_name AS statusName, v.real_name AS realName, v.gender, v.gender_name AS genderName, v.avatar, v.id_card AS idCard, v.college_name AS collegeName, v.major_name AS majorName, v.class_name AS className, v.grade, tg.type AS teacherType, v.counselor_name AS counselorName, v.counselor_avatar AS counselorAvatar, v.counselor_title AS counselorTitle, v.supervisor_name AS supervisorName, v.supervisor_avatar AS supervisorAvatar, v.supervisor_title AS supervisorTitle FROM teacher_graduate tg INNER JOIN teacher t ON tg.teacher_id = t.id INNER JOIN v_graduate_info v ON tg.graduate_id = v.graduate_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY v.graduate_year DESC, v.graduate_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teacher_graduate (teacher_id, graduate_id, type) VALUES (#{teacherId}, #{graduateId}, #{type})
